title: Zoni's War Supplies
description: Mod that adds a Medkit and Combat Rations to aid you in battle.
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

This mod adds a Medkit and MREs and will be updated with other similar supplies with the objective to aid you in the roughest battles alongside your allies.

 

Medkit
The Medkit functions like a Health Potion, but without the drinking delay so you can escape tight situations. The cooldown comes after you use it, so it cannot be spammed.

 

MRE
The MRE it's a food item that gives you a LOT of both saturation and food, so you dont have to always be eating on the battlefield.

 

If you want to get updates on the mod development, report bugs or suggest new stuff or just contact me join my discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG
